name: echoes-as-anchors
title: Echoes as Anchors: Probabilistic Costs and Attention Refocusing in LLM Reasoning
summary: Code for an ICLR 2026 LLM reasoning paper studying Echo of Prompt, echoic prompting, attention refocusing, reasoning probes, and probabilistic analysis.

name: rtk
summary: Rust CLI proxy that reduces LLM agent token consumption by filtering noisy command output before it reaches model context.

name: auto-skill
summary: Few-shot skill induction prototype for turning examples into reusable AI-agent skills.

name: CodexBar
summary: macOS menu bar utility for observing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage.
